navigation.title: Your main workspace, always within reach
navigation.description: Use this navigation area to move quickly through dashboard, AI, tests, syllabus, and Pomodoro. On mobile it collapses into the top menu to keep the UI clean.

dashboardHero.title: An instant view of your preparation
dashboardHero.description: This hero block concentrates your overall status and the most useful shortcuts so you can resume your study flow without friction.

dashboardMetrics.title: Key metrics at a glance
dashboardMetrics.description: Here you track volume, average score, accuracy, best result, pace, and ongoing sessions. It is the quickest place to judge whether your rhythm is where it should be.

dashboardPerformance.title: Recent progress with real context
dashboardPerformance.description: These charts turn your latest attempts into a clear reading of progress, consistency, and room for improvement without leaving the dashboard.

dashboardHistory.title: History to return to the details
dashboardHistory.description: Every recent attempt stays reachable here so you can review date, score, accuracy, and reopen the session exactly where you left it.

accountMenu.title: Preferences and a quick way to replay the tour
accountMenu.description: Your avatar menu groups account settings, theme controls, and the option to launch this walkthrough again whenever you need a fresh orientation.
